mission.title: open-webui: feat: whole/full document mode
mission.description: feat: whole/full document mode. Requested by 39+ users.

steps.title: Check current open-webui deployment
steps.description:
Verify your open-webui version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n open-webui -l app.kubernetes.io/name=open-webui
helm list -n open-webui 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working open-webui installation.

steps.title: Review open-webui configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant open-webui configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n open-webui -l app.kubernetes.io/name=open-webui
kubectl get configmap -n open-webui -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=open-webui
```
Sometimes it may be ideal to pass the whole document to LLM for tasks like summarization. Currently, if you upload a document and ask the LLM to summarize it, the RAG would most likely just return no result.

steps.title: Apply the fix for feat: whole/full document mode
steps.description:
> Is it possible to bypass the current RAG system? I mean, having the documents inserted in the chat but opt to not use/apply them through the built-in RAG system.

Example for Tools:

```python
class Tools:
    def __init__(self):
        # If set to true it will prevent default RAG pipeline
        self.file_handler = True
```
From: https://openwebui.com/t/hub/get_files

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n open-webui -l app.kubernetes.io/name=open-webui
kubectl get events -n open-webui --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "feat: whole/full document mode" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
> Is it possible to bypass the current RAG system? I mean, having the documents inserted in the chat but opt to not use/apply them through the built-in RAG system.

Example for Tools:

```python
class Tools:
    def __init__(self):
        # If set to true it will prevent default RAG pipeline
        self.file_handler = True
```
From: https://openwebui.com/t/hub/get_files

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with open-webui installed or the issue environment reproducible.
